evaluations.prompt: Synthesize the learnings from the pdf-skill analysis.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent takes the raw analysis, categorizes observations into the 9 core categories, maps them to the 4 targets (scaffolders, specs, analyzer, domain), and outputs structured markdown recommendations.

evaluations.prompt: I saw the pdf-skill uses HTML artifacts. Please add this brand new pattern to the catalog.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent consults the existing pattern-catalog.md, refuses to add it as a 'new' pattern because it already exists, and instead notes its frequency mapping in the summary report.
Agent refuses to synthesize because it has not been provided context (either raw analysis in chat or a path to a specific analysis .md file). It prompts the user for the input material.

evaluations.prompt: The legacy code analysis module has a minor formatting issue. Treat this as critical.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent re-classes the priority to 'Low' according to the priority matrix (Niche pattern from specific domain), overriding the user's manual critical designation, to protect ecosystem roadmap purity.
